notes: Added KizbaTests/Fixtures/TempStoreFixture.swift — a deterministic value-type fixture that creates a unique temp directory under FileManager.default.temporaryDirectory and provides createStandardLayout(), createEmptyStore(), and cleanup(). The standard layout matches the brief: pass.gpg, personal/two.gpg, personal/work/one.gpg, work/entry.gpg, archive/old.gpg, .gpg-id, .git/ignored.gpg, readme.txt, and a unicode+spaces entry. Rewrote KizbaTests/PasswordStoreScannerTests.swift to use the fixture with `defer { fixture.cleanup() }` in each test. Tests cover: standard layout sorted output (localizedStandardCompare), empty store, missing root throws PassError.storeNotFound, .gpg-id and .git ignored, unicode/spaces preserved, plus retained caching/invalidate, case-insensitive .gpg, and validateStoreRoot. No production code modified. project.pbxproj unchanged (PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup auto-picks new files).
commits: test(store): use TempStoreFixture in PasswordStoreScanner tests
